title: Project Duplicated As A New Template
excerpt: Can an existing project board be made into a template?

posts.author: Builder (Chris Miller)
posts.cookedHtml: Can an existing project board be made into a template?

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml: Sure, from the board menu ••• Save as a Template.

posts.author: Builder (Chris Miller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Marius,

Thanks for the response. Right on the money!
